productDisplayName: Playboy Women Play It Lovely Perfume
description: Play It Lovely perfume from playboy is an exciting feminine fragrance in a delectable bottle with the bunny ear shaped top with a bow. Opening notes are citrus, blackberries and juicy peaches with a heart of orchid, Belle de Nuit and tuberose and a base of amber, patchouli and tonka.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
